name: Rokiskio Suris AB
summary: Rokiskio Suris AB produces and trades in fermented cheese, whey products, and skimmed milk powder in Lithuania. The company operates in two segments, Fresh Dairy Products, and Cheese and Other Dairy products. It also provides fresh milk products, such as milk, kefir products, sour milk, butter, curd, curd cheese, sour cream, glazed curd cheese bars, desserts, and fermented cheeses, as well as purchases raw milk. The company also exports its products to 49 countries worldwide. Rokiskio suris AB was founded in 1925 and is based in Roki√Ç¬ökis, Lithuania.
